_comment: Cross-language contract for the upstream min-age ISO-8601 duration string (policy.toml [upstream] min_age; devpi index min_upstream_age). Three independent parsers must accept/reject these identically: verdaccio-filter-artea parseDurationMs (TS, returns ms), devpi parse_iso_duration_seconds (Py, returns seconds), policy-sync policy_model._validate_min_age (Py, validates only). Each test suite loads this file so the lockstep is CI-enforced instead of kept in sync by hand-copied regexes. 'seconds' is the canonical magnitude (TS scales by 1000). Inputs are duration STRINGS only — the None/empty/0 short-circuits differ by language binding and are tested separately.
